texto: We are quiet, contemplative people, and our behaviour in the field is relatively aristocratic. Running is not necessarily beneath our dignity but it is in any case pointless because the flies move much too fast. Consequencly, we stand still, as if on guard, and moreover almost exclusively in blazing sunshine, little breeze and fragrant flowers. Passersby can therefore easily get the impression that the fly hunter is a convalescent of some kind, momentarily lost in meditation. This is not wholly inaccurate.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Fredrik Sjöberg: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “We are quiet, contemplative people, and our behaviour in the field is relatively aristocratic. Ru…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, comportment, dignity pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dignity e self-delusion.

Passersby can therefore easily get the impression that the fly hunter is a convalescent of some kind, momentarily lost in meditation. This is not wholly inaccurate.

texto: Every summer there are a number of nights, not many, but a number, when everything is perfect. The light, the warmth, the smells, the mist, the birdsong – the moths. Who can sleep? Who wants to?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Fredrik Sjöberg que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “Every summer there are a number of nights, not many, but a number, when everything is perfect. Th…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, island-landscape, island-summer, com foco em boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.

texto: Some days I tell myself that my mission is to say something about the art and sometimes the bliss of limitation. And the legibility of landscape. Other days are more dismal. As if I were queueing in the rain outside confessional literature’s nudist colony, mirrors everywhere, blue with cold.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Fredrik Sjöberg: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Some days I tell myself that my mission is to say something about the art and sometimes the bliss…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que sabedoria, confessional-literature, humor pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de dia-chuvoso e humor.
